# Coverage Labels Inventory

Generated from baseline data on 2026-05-03
- **T0/**: 5 fixtures × 3 runs at T=0.1 (15 successful fixture-runs)
- **T0_strict/**: 4 successful fixture-runs at T=0

## Summary

| Metric | Count |
|---|---|
| Total label occurrences (EN + TR) | 562 |
| Unique exact label strings | 215 |
| Unique after case/whitespace normalization | 188 |
| Unique English (name) labels | 137 |
| Unique Turkish (nameTr) labels | 78 |
